backup-source-files.description: Protects live trees from shipping .bak copies and preview-only HTML artifacts by accident.

economic-direct-rest-mutations.description: Protects Light-moving tables from new direct REST writes outside approved secondary ledger/receipt writers.

economic-direct-rpc-mutations.description: Protects Light-moving RPC call sites from spreading outside approved service boundaries.

economic-sql-mutations.description: Protects Light-moving database state by requiring new direct SQL mutations to be reviewed in the economic mutation allowlist.

guarded-direct-console.description: Protects the Wave 5 logging-conversion surfaces from regressing back to raw console.* calls in product code.

placeholder-runtime-strings.description: Protects product paths from shipping new runtime strings that advertise unfinished implementation.

query-token-auth.description: Protects against introducing new tokenized URL transport or bootstrap flows while Wave 1 removes the remaining debt.

root-migration-files.description: Protects the canonical Supabase migration flow by rejecting new root-level migration-*.sql files.

wildcard-cors.description: Protects against adding new wildcard or reflective Access-Control-Allow-Origin behavior in production code.
